name: Treasure Hunt (1D)
description: A tiny game: find the hidden treasure by replying left/right/stay using distance-to-goal plus the change since your last action.

binding_vow.description: You are in a 1D world. Each step you receive world_size, steps_left, distance to the treasure, and distance_delta (previous_distance - new_distance). Use distance_delta to infer which direction helps. Reply with EXACTLY ONE token: left OR right OR stay. Reward is 1.0 if you land on the treasure before max steps, otherwise 0.0.

observation_space.description: { "world_size": int, "distance": int, "distance_delta": int, "steps_left": int, "instructions"?: string, "error"?: string }

action_space.description: EXACTLY one token: left | right | stay

reward.description: 1.0 if you find the treasure, else 0.0
